case_title: ZAWIDEW, RAED vs. ABBES, FAYEK et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZAWIDEW, RAED AS TO DEFENDANT ABBES, FAYEK BREAD AND BUTTER MARKET SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-05-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-08-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-15-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-05-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-05-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAY-26-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-26-1993, CONTINUED TO AUG-24-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLTF. MUST GIVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-24-1993, CONTINUED TO OCT-08-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE AND STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT OR WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE WHEN COMPLAINT IS SERVED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-08-1993, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $75.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-08-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), SOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-10-1993 CONTINUED FROM OCT-08-1993 TO NOV-10-1993 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-10-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-10-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DIMSISSED PER CRC 525. HEARING SET FOR DEC-09-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PHOTOCOPY FOR DEFENDANT BREAD AND BUTTER MARKET
